本书多女主，男主不接受任何道德绑架，看得开，看得透，不内耗。
男人，只有两样东西靠得住，一是自己的身体，二是赚钱的能力。
有钱的男人被女人爱，没钱的男人被女人踹。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/6defb9c5d26d8f8c0f4c4846b695d6ae~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"四月骄阳","author_id":"","book_id":"7602642271518854169","book_name":"我不是暴发户，请叫我富一代","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282830","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1163人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":261,"name":"都市日常","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=261&name=都市日常&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":20,"name":"神豪","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=20&name=神豪&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":520,"name":"大佬","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=520&name=大佬&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7612577847990829630","read_count":"1163","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"111328"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"50","tags":"都市日常,都市,开局,多女主,大佬,神豪,打脸","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/6defb9c5d26d8f8c0f4c4846b695d6ae~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779185694&x-signature=WCJ32%2Bwf8i%2BMVyW6lvcleyfno7k%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3281423606749950","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"51"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201814542039C7A3DE636E9E2DBE"}"},"relate_info_l
